'''Yaawl''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fugitive who was once found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. A [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] with a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] took him from Hoth, despite the fact that it meant the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was on their back more. The smuggler paid Yaawl 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day to help him with his duties.
